steps.title: Find the central purpose
steps.content: The text starts with the broad claim that animals use tools, then rejects the old belief that tool use was unique to primates. The dolphin and palm cockatoo examples show that tool use appears across different kinds of animals.

steps.title: Discard narrower claims
steps.content: A is wrong because the text does not question bird intelligence. B is wrong because it never compares humans with palm cockatoos. C is wrong because it does not argue that tool use fails to show intelligence. The answer is D.
